items.reasoning: Sustain through Powershot harass; WR likes to snipe from range.
Recovery after a Powershot + Thunder Clap combo trades poorly.
PA needs last hits for Dagger harass mana and early Battle Fury timing.
Cost-efficient stats; PA's base damage is low without Coup de Grace.
AGI treads for last-hit damage; STR for Thunder Clap resistance.
Passive regen for Powershot chip damage; builds into Battle Fury.
-2 armor on Stifling Dagger harass stacks up against WR's low base armor.
Farm accelerator; cleave ignores evasion so PA still farms fast. 14-16 min target.
-6 armor amplifies Coup de Grace crits. Even evasion heroes melt when a 2000 crit lands.
Counters Windrun 100% evasion and Brewmaster's Drunken Brawler evasion. Non-negotiable pickup.
200% lifesteal active turns Coup de Grace crits into full HP recovery. PA's best survival item.
BKB-piercing stun cancels Windrun or locks Brewmaster before Primal Split.
If Brewmaster cyclone + WR Shackleshot chain-stun, BKB prevents lockdown.
Purges Windrun and prevents WR from using defensive items. Seals kills.

recommendation.overall_strategy: Farm aggressively with Battle Fury into Desolator for early kills. MKB is mandatory third item against two evasion heroes. PA's Blur gives evasion advantage in the mirror -- combine with Satanic for unkillable status during Coup de Grace proc chains.
